response.justification: Bogdan possesses significant and highly relevant domain experience, having founded and developed a geospatial data platform (GISCollective). His work on low-latency, high-throughput systems with Dlang at Dunnhumby is also a strong positive. However, his professional C++ experience is very dated (2015), and he has no listed Rust experience, which is a major gap against the primary technical requirements. The decision to interview hinges on the team's willingness to bet on his ability to quickly ramp up on C++/Rust, leveraging his strong parallel experience in a similar systems language and his clear passion for the geospatial domain.
strengths: Extensive, demonstrated experience and personal passion for geospatial (GIS) data and systems.
Proven experience building low-latency, high-performance data systems at scale.
Deep expertise in a systems programming language (Dlang), suggesting an ability to quickly learn C++ or Rust.
concerns: Lacks recent commercial experience in C++ or Rust; professional C++ experience is brief and from 2015.
Resume is heavily focused on web technologies (Node.js, TypeScript) and Dlang, not the core C++/Rust stack required.
Experience seems more oriented towards application/platform development rather than core data pipeline optimization and tiling.
